---
title: "PyMathon"
description: "Learn mathematics through clear proofs, JEE problem solving, Python verification, interactive visualisations, and carefully explained examples."
author: "Ashish K. Srivastava"
comments: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

::: {.pymathon-home-hero}
::: {.pymathon-home-kicker}
MATHEMATICS · PYTHON · VISUAL THINKING
:::

# Welcome to PyMathon

PyMathon brings **Mathematics**, **Python**, and **Problem Solving** together in one place.

Here you will find concise explanations that move from a clear idea to a complete solution, with computation used to verify rather than replace reasoning.

[About Ashish K. Srivastava](about.qmd){.btn .btn-primary .pymathon-cta}
:::

## Featured Article

::: {.featured-article}
### [Four Ways to Count Positive Integer Solutions](posts/positive-integer-solutions/index.qmd)

Learn how direct counting, non-negative substitutions, floor functions, generating functions, and Python all lead to the same answer.

[Read the article](posts/positive-integer-solutions/index.qmd){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::

## What You Will Find Here

- rigorous mathematical solutions;
- multiple approaches to the same problem;
- Python verification;
- visual explanations; and
- practice problems to extend each idea.

## Latest Articles
